name: ms-mcp
description: External MCP server for controlling BIOVIA Materials Studio through MaterialsScript.

interface.longDescription: Run MaterialsScript workflows, create new structures through a unified CIF-first entry point, edit the current GUI structure in place, keep outputs organized in numbered task/session folders, build supercells and vacuum slabs, launch Forcite, DMol3, and CASTEP jobs, and inspect generated outputs from Codex through a local MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Create a new structure with CIF-first lookup
